test-method.name: test
test-method.description: Register a new account using the LoginPage POM

exception.message:
Locator expected to contain text Expected: Your Account Has Not Been Created! Received: Your Account Has Been Created! Call log: - Assert "containsText" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByText("Your Account Has Been Created!", new Page.GetByTextOptions().setExact(true)) 4 × locator resolved to

…

- unexpected value " Your Account Has Been Created!"
exception.full-stacktrace:
org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Locator expected to contain text Expected: Your Account Has Not Been Created! Received: Your Account Has Been Created! Call log: - Assert "containsText" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByText("Your Account Has Been Created!", new Page.GetByTextOptions().setExact(true)) 4 × locator resolved to

…
